name: lacore-docs
description: Documentation site for LACORE — the configurable FiveM roleplay core by @tabysi. Built with Nextra.
comment:overrides: postcss <8.5.10 (GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93) reaches us only through next and runs at build time on our own CSS, so the XSS path (untrusted CSS input) is not reachable. Pinned anyway to keep the alert list clean.
